title: EssentialsXTPHook
description: Adds click functionality and notifications to TPA requests for EssentialsX
body:
**Adds configurable notification sounds, and a clickable [✔] and [✘] to the `/tpa` and `/tpahere` requests sent via EssentialsX.**

**Requires EssentialsX to run!!**

Made it for personal use, but thought I'd share it anyway for others who relate to the pain of silent and tedious EssentialsX teleport requests. 

### NOTE
Sounds and messages are configurable.
As a student, I cannot guarantee timely updates or support. I'll be updating this project when I get time, and when I find issues to fix/improvements to make. If this plugin requires updates, interested developers are free to fork this project and publish updates, as long as this page, and I, the original creator are credited.


## Happy Minecrafting!
